chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1611 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution. 22-10-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Abbasi, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioners submits that the present petition was filed to challenge the process of conducting the test through the Pakistan Testing Service; however, since the said process has now been cancelled by the department itself, he does not press the instant petition, which, having become infructuous, is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
